summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Create Valuation Premium UX flow. All 12 requested features verified working with 100% pass rate. Tested 4-step wizard, ARR/MRR toggle, 2-column layout with Preview Panel, live valuation estimates, tooltips, micro-animations, and mobile collapsible accordion.

issues: Business Model select appears empty/blank by default but requires selection (not pre-selected with default value)

passed_tests: Step 1 (Company) form displays correctly with all fields - VERIFIED
Step 1 has Company Name, Industry, Business Model, Stage, HQ Country, Founded Year inputs - VERIFIED
All fields have tooltip icons (6 found) that show descriptive text on hover - VERIFIED
Step 2 (Financials) shows ARR/MRR toggle with button styling - VERIFIED
ARR/MRR toggle switches between inputs correctly (only one visible at a time) - VERIFIED
Step 2 shows Preview Panel on desktop (right sidebar) - VERIFIED
Preview Panel shows 'Enter your ARR and metrics to see your valuation estimate' when empty - VERIFIED
Preview Panel updates in real-time as user enters financial data - VERIFIED
Preview Panel shows estimated multiple range (e.g., 4.8x - 7.2x ARR) - VERIFIED
Preview Panel shows estimated valuation range (e.g., $4.8M - $7.2M) - VERIFIED
Preview Panel shows confidence level (Low/Moderate/High with dots indicator) - VERIFIED
Preview Panel shows top driver when growth rate is entered (e.g., '85% YoY Growth') - VERIFIED
Step 3 (Qualitative) displays product maturity slider (1-5 scale with labels MVP to Leader) - VERIFIED
Step 3 shows market size cards (Small/Medium/Large with TAM descriptions) - VERIFIED
Step 3 shows competitive moat cards (Low/Medium/Strong with descriptions) - VERIFIED
Step 3 shows deal readiness optional fields (customer concentration, churn, founder hours) - VERIFIED
Step 3 has audited financials toggle button (green check when active) - VERIFIED
Step 3 has stripe connected toggle button (Revenue Verified with green check) - VERIFIED
Step 3 button changes to 'Generate Valuation' - VERIFIED
Navigation Back button works correctly (returns to previous step) - VERIFIED
Navigation Continue button enables when required fields filled - VERIFIED
2-column layout on desktop (form left ~60%, preview right ~340px) - VERIFIED
Mobile view hides desktop preview panel - VERIFIED
Mobile view shows collapsible preview accordion at bottom - VERIFIED
Mobile accordion shows 'Valuation Preview' with multiple range when collapsed - VERIFIED
Mobile accordion expands to show full 'Live Estimate' panel - VERIFIED
Micro-animations working (AnimatePresence for step transitions) - VERIFIED
Motion effects on market/moat card hover (whileHover, whileTap) - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
TooltipProvider wraps entire form with delayDuration=200 for good UX
ARR/MRR toggle uses useState('arr') with AnimatePresence for smooth transitions
Preview panel calculation uses useMemo for performance optimization
Mobile collapsible preview uses isMobile prop to render different UIs
Motion animations use framer-motion with appropriate durations (0.2-0.4s)
seed_data_creation: Created test user, session, and project for testing Create Valuation flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Create Valuation flow is fully functional. Key test selectors: create-valuation, input-company-name, select-industry, select-business-model, select-stage, select-country, input-founding-year, toggle-arr, toggle-mrr, input-arr, input-mrr, input-growth-rate, input-gross-margin, input-nrr, input-team-size, input-burn-multiple, input-runway, slider-product-maturity, btn-market-small/medium/large, btn-moat-low/medium/strong, input-customer-concentration, input-churn-rate, input-founder-hours, toggle-audited-financials, toggle-stripe-connected, btn-next, btn-back, preview-panel-desktop, preview-panel-mobile, preview-toggle-mobile, step-indicator-1/2/3/4.
